name: Green Campus
title: Green Campus Initiative
description: Our campus promotes sustainability with green spaces, eco-friendly infrastructure, and energy conservation initiatives.

name: SAC (Student Activity Center)
title: SAC - A Hub for Campus Life
description: The Student Activity Center offers a vibrant space for clubs to organize meetings, events, and cultural festivities.

name: Gym
title: Campus Gymnasium
description: State-of-the-art gym facilities for fitness, sports training, and wellness programs for students and staff.
achievements: Top 10 fitness center in the region

name: Sports
title: Sports and Recreation
description: Our campus offers a range of sports facilities including courts, tracks, and fields for internal and inter-collegiate competitions.

name: Technowave
title: Technowave - Innovation Hub
description: Technowave is a technology incubator providing mentorship, resources, and workspace for budding entrepreneurs and technophiles.
